# Beautiful India - Bharat Darshan

> Discover the incredible beauty of India with curated tour packages.

Beautiful India (Bharat Darshan) is a premier travel platform offering curated tour packages across India's most iconic destinations. From the snow-capped mountains of Kashmir and Himachal to the royal palaces of Rajasthan and the serene backwaters of Kerala, we provide comprehensive travel experiences including itineraries, pricing, and expert guides.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://bhaktikishakti.com/) - Explore India's wonders and featured tours.
- [Tours](https://bhaktikishakti.com/tours) - Comprehensive list of all tour packages.
- [About Us](https://bhaktikishakti.com/about) - Learn about our mission and expertise.
- [Contact](https://bhaktikishakti.com/contact) - Get in touch for custom bookings.
- [Festivals](https://bhaktikishakti.com/festivals) - Discover India's vibrant cultural celebrations.
- [Privacy Policy](https://bhaktikishakti.com/privacy) - How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](https://bhaktikishakti.com/terms) - Usage guidelines and booking terms.

## Featured Tours
- [Kashmir Tour Package](https://bhaktikishakti.com/tours/kashmir-tour-package) - 7-day experience in Srinagar, Gulmarg, and Pahalgam.
- [Kerala Tour Package](https://bhaktikishakti.com/tours/kerala-tour-package) - Scenic escapes in the backwaters of Kerala.
- [Golden Triangle Train Tour](https://bhaktikishakti.com/tours/golden-triangle-train-tour) - The classic Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur circuit by train.
- [South India Temple Run](https://bhaktikishakti.com/tours/south-india-temple-run-by-train) - Tranquil temple visits and lush landscapes.

## Travel Resources
- [Travel Guides](https://bhaktikishakti.com/guides) - Expert tips and destination reviews.
- [Safety Advisory](https://bhaktikishakti.com/guides/safety) - Essential safety tips for travelers in India.

## Data Feeds for Agents
- [Sitemap](https://bhaktikishakti.com/sitemap.xml) - Full site structure.
- [Tours RSS](https://bhaktikishakti.com/rss-tours.xml) - Latest tour updates.
- [Guides RSS](https://bhaktikishakti.com/rss-guides.xml) - Latest travel articles.
